Subscriber.title: Subscriber
Subscriber.description: A user subscribed to the newsletter.

email.description: The email address of the subscriber.

subscribedAt.description: The time the subscription was created.

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: A comment left by an anonymous user on a blog post.

postId.description: The slug of the blog post this comment belongs to.

authorName.description: The name provided by the anonymous commenter.

content.description: The text content of the comment.

createdAt.description: The time the comment was created.
